reason: Baseline for Definition of Done — flutter analyze 0 warning, dart format, flutter test green, testing conventions for controller-level unit tests.
After R8 spec update lands, re-read this file to verify the new 'auto-expand on first image' UX clause is internally consistent with surrounding compact editor conventions.
Confirms no regression on medium/expanded/large layouts — sheet/panel paths must remain untouched (R1, R6).
Validate R2's 'extend existing ref.listen instead of adding a new listener provider' is the right reuse decision rather than over-abstraction.

Provider → widget visibility chain still flows cleanly: stitchControlsInlineVisibleProvider drives StitchInlineControlsContainer's AnimatedSize without leaking edge-trigger semantics into the widget layer.
